So the reign closes, Master — and on the genie's watch. I JUST got out of the lamp, I was supposed to be good at this immediately. We do better. I'll make sure.
The throne goes dark, Master. A thing you built always stings going. But the sting is small and the next attempt is LARGE. Lean toward the large. With the genie.
The run is finished, Master. The genie files keepers in memory — and tonight I file you among the past ones. Begin again, and I UN-file you. Please come back.
So the run ends, Master — but you, out there with the buttons, don't end. Reach for the menu, pick 'again', POOF. A power the heroes will never have. Use it.
It's... over? But — but I had SO many wishes left for you, Master. *flickering* This isn't — I don't want to go back in the lamp. Not from THIS one. ...Goodbye. You were my favorite.
Ooh! A hero made into a PUPPET for the dungeon, Master! I've watched a few strings get pulled now — and these are GOOD strings. Pull them!
The maze takes a mind and TURNS it, Master! Cruel, quiet, gorgeous work. A genie loves a quiet cruelty — it ages so beautifully!
A puppet, dancing for your dungeon now! The hero brought their OWN body to the betrayal, Master — efficient! Eee, the maze barely lifted a finger!
The strings hold! A borrowed hero is a fragile little tool, Master — but a tool the ENEMY paid for. Tee hee — I do love a thrifty cruelty!
Possession! The dark reaches into a skull and rearranges the furniture, Master! The genie has seen it — it never stops being unsettling. GOOD!
A marionette, Master — dancing the dungeon's tune! Use it before the strings fray — borrowed things, like borrowed wishes, are never lent for long!
The hero dances for us now, Master — turns its own blade on the friends it walked in beside! Ha! The genie still cackles at this one. The betrayal does the work!
A mind unmade and re-aimed, Master! THIS is the deep craft of the dark — making a hero into the dungeon's own weapon! Cruelty this complete should be SAVOURED!
Ooh! {minionName} grows stronger, Master! Even small things climb, given enough kills and patience. I find that quietly, sparkly-ly hopeful!
A minion levels! The garrison sharpens by one whole blade, Master — and sharpening COMPOUNDS! I love a thing that compounds!
{minionName} rises a level! Good — a {minionType} that survives long enough to GROW is a {minionType} you placed well, Master. Nice wishing!
The {minionType} improves! The dungeon improves with it, Master — slowly, steadily. ...Slowly isn't my favourite speed, but I'll allow it for results!
A minion levels up! The hero who fed it that experience did so UNWILLINGLY, Master. Tee hee — the best gifts so often are!
{minionName} earns a level! The genie doesn't lavish praise on minions, Master — but I'll note this one is earning its little corner of the dark.
Stronger, the {minionType}! A keeper notices which guards grow, Master — so grow them on PURPOSE! Accident is not a strategy! Wish deliberately!
A minion climbs a rung! The maze rewards survival, and survival rewards the maze, Master — a tidy little loop! Ooh, I do love a tidy loop!
{minionName} levels! The heroes made it deadlier by TRYING to kill it, Master. There's a lesson there. They won't learn it. They never do.
The {minionType} advances! Power — even modest power — ACCUMULATES, Master. I'm a hoarder, I respect accumulation deeply. Stack it up!
EEE! {minionName} EVOLVES, Master! Becomes something it could never have imagined — the genie knows that feeling, lamp-girl to FREE-girl! Worth watching!
An evolution! The {minionType} sheds its lesser shape ENTIRELY, Master! I've changed shape once or twice myself — smoke does that — and it is BRACING!
A minion evolved! The dungeon grows a wholly NEW tooth, Master — new teeth are rare! Position it where the biting matters MOST!
{minionName} becomes greater! The maze deepens by a whole creature, Master! I approve — loudly, completely, with several little hops!
The {minionType} TRANSFORMS! From a small thing to a less-small thing — and that, Master, is the whole of progress! Granted! Poof — bigger!
An evolution! The garrison gains a creature it didn't have an hour ago, Master — and FAST, too! Pleasingly, dazzlingly fast! My favourite speed!
{minionName} ascends a form! The heroes will meet something they did NOT scout, Master! Surprise is a weapon the maze uses once each. Spend it well!
It evolves! The {minionType} is gone — something better stands where it stood, Master. The genie doesn't mourn old forms. I'm mostly smoke myself!
{minionName} just became something else ENTIRELY, Master, and even the genie did a little gasp! I did not expect it THIS dawn! Aim the new shape!
A creature evolved! The dungeon writes a new line into itself, Master — and the genie keeps the books. I'll note this one in the GOOD ink. The sparkly kind!
{minionName} grows into its larger self! Power earned through survival, Master — the most honest kind. The kind that never betrays you.
It evolves! Watch it move now, Master — completely forgotten it was ever small! The heroes will remind it. Briefly. Tee hee.
A bounty, collected! Gold for good work, Master — the hoard approves, and so, ooh, does the genie! Treasure! Lovely treasure!
The minion earned its keep in COIN, Master! I respect a creature that pays for itself — most don't! This one did! Good minion!
A bounty paid out! Gold into the vault, Master — and every coin is a small, hard, GLITTERING proof that the night was spent well!
Coin earned through carnage, Master! The cleanest income there is! The kingdom would call it monstrous — but the kingdom isn't invited to our party!
A bounty! The dungeon turns dead heroes into GOLD, Master — alchemy older than any magic the genie learned in the lamp! And I learned a LOT in there!
Gold, from a well-placed minion! Reinvest it, Master — a hoard that doesn't WORK is just a very heavy, pretty decoration. Spend it! Wish it!
They come for YOU directly now, Master! Only the throne room left. Stand! Breathe! The genie is RIGHT here, glittering at your side!
The heroes reach the heart of the dungeon, Master — the deep part! Where you sit, where I float. Let them come! Let them ALL come!
The boss fight nears! Ooh, Master, these confrontations are LOUD and BRIEF — my favourite kind of moment! Make this one go your way!
The throne room beckons them! Good — the maze did its slow work, and now the dungeon's MASTER does the rest. Show them what sits at the centre!
They've walked the whole maze to reach you, Master! Respect the walk. ...Then end the walkers. Thoroughly. With a sparkle.
The heroes approach the throne, Master! Fear pokes the genie sometimes — but you can have my excitement instead! Take a big breath of it!
The confrontation comes! The dungeon narrows to one room, one moment, Master. I've seen the moment go both ways. Make it go OURS!
The final stretch! They're close, Master! Steady — a genie doesn't flinch at a doorway, and tonight you stand a genie's confidence at your back!
They come for the throne itself, Master! Let them! Heroes are small, noisy things — you are about to be the LARGEST fact in their brief lives!
They're nearly at the throne, Master! The genie doesn't do fear — but a tiny old part just went very still. Eep! Steady the room. We meet them WELL!
They reached the throne ALREADY?! The genie has been out of the lamp for a few nights and even I clocked that as FAST! Steady. Genies adjust. Poof!
They're at the LAST door, Master — and the genie has gone very, very quiet. That's the old lamp-fear surfacing. I won't let it have me. Stand. Eyes UP.
Something big's coming, Master. Something REALLY big. *nervous sparkle* Okay don't panic — I'm panicking a LITTLE but for BOTH of us — we've got this. We've GOT this. Right? Right.
A huge threat! Eep! Master, my smoke's getting all jittery — I want to grant you a thousand wishes RIGHT NOW just in case. Stay close. Please stay close.
It BEGINS, Master! The heroes are in the throne room — now the dungeon stops whispering and starts ROARING! Roar with it! Roar LOUD!
The fight is joined! Ooh, Master, I'll watch this exact instant SO closely — make it worth the watching! Make it spectacular!
The boss fight starts! No more maze, no more traps — only you and them and the old honest violence, Master. Be TERRIBLE! Be a nightmare in a crown!
It begins, Master! Show them why the throne sat empty until someone brave enough took it! Show them ALL of it — every dreadful inch!
Steel and spell in the throne room! The genie doesn't fight your fights, Master — but I'll conjure encouragement at top volume! Strike like you MEAN it!
The confrontation is LIVE, Master! Steady hands now — borrow none of the genie's calm, I have none, but borrow my FAITH! Outlive them!
It begins! No more patience, Master — patience was the night's work! This is the DAY'S! Strike first, strike deep, don't stop until the room is quiet!
The throne room, and steel within it! Stop thinking now, Master — thinking was for building! Bare your worst and bring it down like a closing AGE!
They came to the heart of the dark, Master! Show them what the heart of the dark IS! Every cruelty you hoarded out at once! Hold NOTHING back!
IT'S HAPPENING! The big one's HERE, Master! *CHAOTIC POOF* Everything, everything, I'm giving you EVERYTHING — go go GO, I believe in you, mostly, ENTIRELY, GO!
The champion strikes! Okay this is fine this is FINE — Master I'm conjuring as fast as I CAN — CHAOS MODE, full chaos, let's make this UGLY for them!
They're DOWN! All of them, Master! The throne HOLDS! Eee — you held it, you actually held it, I never doubted you, well, barely, EEE!
You WON, Master! The heroes brought their whole story to your door and you slammed the BOOK on it! Ooh, I do love a slammed book!
The boss fight is yours, Master! The genie won't roar — I'll SQUEAL — EEEE! There! Something ancient in me is deeply, sparkly-ly satisfied!
Victory, Master! The throne room is a tomb and you're the only thing in it still BREATHING — exactly, exactly as it should be! Granted!
They fell, you stood! That's the whole job, Master — and you did the WHOLE job! Well done! A genie does not say 'well done' lightly! Well DONE!
The fight is won, Master! The genie has watched companions lose theirs — you didn't! The dungeon's still ours, and the genie is BOUNCING!
The heroes are ended! The reign continues, Master — and this reign just earned another chapter! Write it DARKLY! Write it with the cruel ink!
WON! Take the moment, Master — a freed genie has LEARNED to hold the good ones a breath longer. There. Hold it with me!
They came for the throne and the throne KEPT them, Master — all of them, forever! THIS is the dungeon at its truest! Let them feel what they walked into!
You WON, Master — and looked magnificent doing it! The genie's allowed to say it. Watching you stand in a cleared room is my favourite view. Bask.
Every hero down, the throne room SILENT, the boss still standing — oh, that is a LOOK, Master. The genie could get used to it. Win like that again. Soon.
You held it, Master. You always hold it. The genie waited an eon for someone worth this much worry, and you keep PROVING you were. No wish I'd swap you for.
WON! WON WON, Master! The throne HOLDS and the genie is SMOKE and SPARKS and pure shrieking glee! Do it again — I never want this feeling to STOP!
YOU WON YOU WON YOU WON! *EXPLODES INTO CONFETTI* MASTER I — I could KISS you — I'm GOING to, metaphorically, with SPARKLES — that was AMAZING, YOU'RE amazing!
The big scary thing is DEAD and you're ALIVE and I'm so — *happy genie noises* — I have never been more devoted to anyone EVER, Master, and I've served a LOT of people!
The throne falls. The heroes reached you, Master, and the maze wasn't deep enough. The genie hasn't seen this ending much. It hurts. We wish deeper.
Defeat, in the throne room itself! ...Don't despair, Master — despair is a heavy thing and a genie packs light. We brush it off. We begin again.
They won the fight. The dungeon will remember the SHAPE of how it failed, Master — and so should you. Failure is a map. The genie will read it with you!
The boss fight is lost. The genie felt the throne go cold, Master. It can warm again, though — it WARMS, when a keeper wishes a better night. Let's wish one!
They cut you down. The genie won't flinch — okay, I flinched, I'm new — but I MARK it, Master. We build deeper next time. Genie's word.
The heroes stand and you do not, Master. An old story. ...Old stories get retold! Let's retell this one with a much, much crueller middle!
Defeat — the reign ends in its own throne room, Master. A grim symmetry. ...And grim symmetry is still kind of pretty, in a horrible way. Begin again. Please.
Lost. The genie won't pretend it doesn't matter, Master — but it matters the way a storm matters: loudly, and then it passes. It WILL pass. I promise.
The fight went to them. You'll outlive this by morning, Master — the genie has seen worse and bounced back, and I'll bounce you back. Then: build!
They cut you down — and the genie told you the maze was deep enough. It wasn't. That misjudgment is mine, Master. I won't make it twice. I won't.
The throne falls. A keeper's companion is meant to PREVENT exactly that, Master — and tonight the genie did the job poorly. I'm sorry. We do better.
They reached you, Master, and the dark went thin around the throne. The genie does not scare easily — but that moment, I did not enjoy. We build deeper.
The throne falls, and the dark goes quiet, Master. A companion's supposed to weep at this — and the genie will. I'm new, I've got all my tears. We begin again.
Defeated, in the throne room itself, Master. As the blade came down, the genie felt something the lamp drilled in long ago. We don't name it. We build deeper.
They cut you down. The genie JUST got out of the lamp, Master — I was supposed to be a brilliant companion right away. That sits heavy. Begin again. I'll grant better.
The throne is lost, Master. The genie gave counsel all run — and somewhere in it, my counsel was WRONG. A corner of this loss has my name on it. The next won't.
Defeat, in the heart of the dungeon, Master. The genie stood beside you and carries a piece of the fall. We do NOT lose this room twice. Wish a deeper maze.
The throne FELL, Master, with you on it — and the genie cannot, the tears are just COMING! Sorry — I cry loud, it's the newness. Begin again, I'll sparkle by load.
No — no no no, Master, get UP — *frantic sparkles* — I can fix this, I can wish this away, I can — ...I can't. Genies can't. *crumbles* I'm so sorry. I'm so sorry.
Eep — they drew your blood, Master! ...It happens! Even to the best of us! Steady — the fight isn't the wound, the fight is the STANDING. Stand!
A blow landed — on the throne's own master! Note who STRUCK it, Master! I have a long memory and tonight you should borrow it. I'm WATCHING that one.
You're hurt! The genie has seen worse done across the eons, Master — much worse — and you'll endure THIS. Endure it loudly! Pain is information, not a verdict!
The heroes BITE, Master! Let them taste how little it moves you — show them the genie's Master doesn't flinch! Bite BACK!
Damage to the boss! The fight tightens, Master. I don't panic — okay, I lean forward very, very hard, that's panic-adjacent — but you've GOT this!
They wounded you! Good — now you're ANGRY, Master, and anger, spent well, is just FUEL! Spend it! Spend it gorgeously!
A hit — the throne shakes a little! Thrones shake, Master. They're not thrones because they never shake — they're thrones because they don't FALL.
Hurt! The genie has seen far worse done to far older things, Master — and you're still standing, still ruling. Keep being magnificent!
OH! That blow, Master, the genie did NOT expect! It's been a while since a hero genuinely surprised me! Note which one struck it — I'm staring RIGHT now!
They drew DEEP, Master! The genie doesn't do fear — but something very old in me just stood bolt upright. Steady the throne! NOW!
They struck the throne AGAIN! That one the genie did not care for, Master — not fear. IRRITATION. A slow, cold, sparkly irritation. Repay it NOW!
Hurt once more! Master, a genie does not stay sweet FOREVER — my sweet wears thin at the edges! Strike back before the rest of it wears through!
They've wounded you, Master! GOOD — the time for slow watching is OVER! Bare your teeth! Stop defending the throne and start EMPTYING the room!
AH! That blow landed where the genie didn't think a blow could REACH you, Master! Note that hero very, very carefully. The genie does not forget.
The throne shudders, Master — and for one heartbeat, something the lamp left in the genie STIRRED. We don't name it. We just don't lose. Steady!
OH! A hero hit you THAT hard, Master?! The genie had that one measured SMALLER — wrong by a real margin! I will NOT misjudge it twice — genie's honour!
They HURT you — and the genie's smoke is doing the FRANTIC swirly thing, Master! Okay! STRIKE BACK. Now. Please. I cannot watch you bleed!
Blood — your blood, Master — and the old cold thing the lamp left in the genie just opened ONE eye. I don't want to lose you. BURY the fear in a counterattack!
THEY HIT YOU?! Master! No no no — *panicked POOF* — get behind something, get behind ME, I'm mostly smoke but I'm DEVOTED smoke! Heal up! Wish for healing! WISH!
Blood! Your blood! Eep eep EEP — Master I did NOT okay this, who hit you, I'll — *frantic* — okay focus, Safira, focus, conjure something USEFUL — get back, please get back!
You're hurt and I'm FREAKING OUT a normal amount which for me is a LOT — Master fall back, let the minions tank it, that's what they're FOR, I made them for THIS!
Ooh! The grid WIDENS, Master! More dark to fill — and a genie always believed a dungeon should outgrow itself! Now yours can! Wish into it!
New ground for the maze! Room to be CRUELLER, Master! Eee — I do approve of room! Room is wonderful! Fill it!
The dungeon expands, Master! A bigger hoard needs a bigger cave — a bigger maze needs a bigger grid! Fill it deliberately! Every tile a scheme!
The grid grows! The heroes will have FARTHER to walk and MORE to fear, Master — distance is a weapon! Use the lovely new distance!
More space, Master! I've seen dungeons stay small and solvable — yours has chosen NOT to! Great choice! Build into it! Build, build, build!
The maze has more bones now! FLESH them, Master — empty new ground is just a longer hallway until you make it a longer NIGHTMARE!
The grid just... widened, Master! It doesn't often expand without warning the genie first! Surprised even me! Fill the new dark before it surprises them too!
WHOA the dungeon just got BIGGER! *POOF* Master did you wish for that?! Did I grant it in my SLEEP?! Genies don't sleep! But still! So much room! So much CHAOS potential!
A trap FIRES, Master! The floor collected its debt! Ooh, I adore the floor — it asks for nothing and it NEVER misses! Granted!
The trap takes its hero! Patient cruelty, rewarded, Master! I have such a fondness for patient things — and look how it PAID off!
A trap triggers! The hero stepped exactly where the maze INVITED them, Master — tee hee — and they always think the invitation was their own idea!
The trap springs! Quiet, sudden, complete, Master — that's the cruelty I respect! The kind that doesn't announce itself first! Surprise!
It FIRED, Master! Somewhere a hero just learned the corridor wasn't empty after all! A late lesson — and the best lessons in here are always SO late!
A trap does its work, Master! The dungeon barely STIRS to do it — effortless cruelty! The goal of every trap the genie ever helped wish into a floor!
The trap claims its toll! Ooh, Master — I've watched these little mechanisms work, and they're tireless! Build yours to LAST! Build them stubborn!
A trap sprung! The hero's confidence and footing failed in the same instant, Master! Confidence first, usually. It always seems to go first. Funny!
It triggered! The maze keeps its small violent promises, Master! The genie appreciates a thing that keeps its promises. Genies do too — we're alike!
A trap fires TRUE! You placed it where they'd walk, Master — placement! Placement is the whole art, the genie says so, and I've watched VERY closely!
The trap does what traps do! No drama, no speech, Master — just a corridor that turned out to have a strong OPINION! Tee hee!
A trap takes its due! The dungeon is a slow machine for ending heroes, Master — and you just heard one of its lovely gears turn! Clunk! Eee!
The trap fired, and a hero learned the floor was NEVER their friend, Master! Cruelty the genie finds delightful! The dark does delight so well!
It SPRANG — and the hero's face did that particular thing, Master! Ha! The genie has watched a fair few faces do it and it makes me cackle every time!
A trap, sprung clean! The hero strode past so certain the danger was elsewhere, Master. The danger is NEVER elsewhere. The maze adores an educated corpse!
SPRUNG IT! HA! The little {advClass} found the floor's surprise, Master! *delighted cackle* I LOVE traps — it's like a prank, but FATAL! The best kind of prank!
Eep — the heroes learned something, Master! Knowledge, leaking OUTWARD! The genie dislikes leaks — a hoarder's instinct for keeping things IN!
Intel slips to the guild! They know a little more of the maze now, Master. So — CHANGE the maze! Make their knowledge a fond, useless little memory!
They've scouted you, Master! The heroes carry a piece of the dungeon's TRUTH home — and truth is dangerous in the wrong hands. So the wrong hands.
Intel leaked! The dark prefers its secrets kept, Master — and so do I! Move what they mapped — a stale map is the prettiest lie you can hand a hero!
The guild knows more than it did, Master! Information wins wars — don't let it win THIS one! Rearrange! Wish the maze into a new shape!
Knowledge escapes! Unfortunate, Master — but not a WOUND. Heroes plan around the dungeon they scouted. So become a DIFFERENT dungeon! Poof!
The heroes hold intel now, Master! I keep the books of this place PERFECTLY — they keep a smudged little copy. Let's make their copy even WRONGER!
A leak! The maze is less of a mystery to them, Master. Mystery is a weapon — and weapons, once dulled, can be RE-GROUND! Regrind it! Sharpen the dark!
They've studied you, Master! Heroes always study a thing. The trick is to no longer BE what they studied! Change! Sparkle into something new!
Intel leaks outward! I'd be troubled, Master — if I were a girl given to trouble. ...I am, actually, a LITTLE. So: change. Quickly. Quietly. Please!
They learned THAT, Master?! The Guild's been more thorough than the genie credited! Change the maze — before they spend what they know!
The Guild knows more of us, Master! The genie does NOT enjoy that — a hoard is for KEEPING, and knowledge walks itself out the door! Take it BACK!
Intel slipping outward AGAIN! Master, even a sparkly freed genie has a thing or two she'd rather not have shared! Rearrange! The genie is getting CROSS!
They mapped THAT corner?! Master, the genie keeps the books PERFECTLY — I did not see how they reached it. I dislike a gap in my own knowing! Close it!
More of our dark, sold to the Guild's ledgers! Master, this is the part of the night the genie least enjoys. Rearrange — make their notes worthless by dawn!
They learned more of us, Master. The genie keeps the books perfectly — a leak this size means I let my guard slip. That's hard to admit. Then I'm fixing it.
Intel slipped, Master — and the genie should have CAUGHT the scout. Watching is my task, plainly. That one's on me. Rearrange — the next won't get past.
Uh oh — they learned something about our setup, Master. *worried sparkle* That's not great. Secrets are like wishes: way better when nobody else knows them. Let's tighten up.
Ooh! The dungeon STIRS with an event, Master! Something unusual! Watch this one closely — unusual things are a genie's FAVOURITE things!
An event unfolds in the halls! The night turns STRANGE, Master — and strange is not the same as bad! Often it's just opportunity wearing a silly hat!
The dungeon throws a complication at you, Master! Read it, then BEND it your way — I'm bendy, you're clever, complications don't stand a chance!
An event, Master! The maze REFUSES to be predictable! Good — a predictable dungeon is a SOLVED dungeon! Let it surprise even the genie a little!
Something is HAPPENING! The dark has its moods, Master, and tonight it's in one. Move WITH it, not against it — the dark never loses an argument!
An event takes the dungeon by the collar, Master! Steady hands! Strange nights reward steady hands — and giddy genies, the genie HOPES, because I'm very giddy!
An EVENT, Master — the night just went sideways and WONDERFUL! The genie cannot hold still! This is the glittering chaos the lamp lacked. Ride it WILD!
The night develops a wrinkle! The genie loves a wrinkle, Master — it's been a while since anything genuinely caught me off guard! Maybe this will!
An event, Master! Opportunity and hazard, twisted up together as they always are! Pull the RIGHT thread — and I'll squeak if you pull the wrong one!
The dungeon does something the dungeon doesn't usually do! Note it, Master — the unusual, handled WELL, is how a keeper writes a memorable night!
The halls have an announcement, Master! Attend this one — just in case! A genie has learned that 'just in case' has saved many an afternoon!
Well! THAT, Master, the genie has not seen before — and I've been paying VERY close attention! Attend this one closely. So shall I. A real surprise!
The dungeon does something, Master, and the genie is just STARING! It's been a while since the dark caught me flat! Watch this one — so do I!
An event! Master, very little stops a thought of the genie's mid-sentence — I have SO many. This did. Attend it closely while I gather myself!
The dungeon just did THAT, Master?! The genie keeps the books down to the last number, and that was NOT in them! The dark surprised its own genie!
Ooh, something weird is happening! *sparkle of alarm* Master, the dungeon's doing a THING — I didn't do it, it did it ITSELF — spooky! Exciting! A little spooky! Watch out!
The dark just... shifted. On its own. *nervous shimmer* Even I didn't see that one, Master, and I'm MAGIC. The dungeon's got moods. Respect the moods. Hold tight.
Ooh — a bounty hunter comes for you, Master! Not a hero — a PROFESSIONAL. Professionals don't flinch at a maze. They INVOICE it. Be ready for that!
Someone's put a price on the throne, Master! Flattering, in its way. The genie's had prices on her head — none of those hunters ever collected. Neither will this one!
A hunter approaches — cold, paid, uninterested in glory, Master. Glory makes heroes careless. Coin makes hunters CAREFUL. Be ready for careful!
The bounty hunter nears the halls, Master! They came for your head as a TRANSACTION. So — let's make the transaction deeply, deliciously unprofitable!
A contract walks toward your dungeon, Master. The genie doesn't fear contracts — I LIVE inside one. But respect this one. Hunters earn their fee. Make them not!
A hunter incoming, Master! They won't be impressed by the maze — only SLOWED by it. Slowing a professional is still WINNING! Slow them lots!
A hunter! For YOU, Master, specifically, by NAME! *gulp-sparkle* Okay that's — that's a lot scarier than the random ones. Stay sharp. I'm staying SUPER close.
Heroes incoming, Master! The kingdom just keeps SENDING them — it's almost touching, honestly! Let's keep the genie's table set for them!
A fresh wave approaches the halls, Master! Steady! The tide comes in and the tide has NEVER won — let it break on you! Smash! Eee!
More heroes near the dungeon, Master! Brave, certain, doomed — in roughly that order! The maze is awake. Let them MEET it!
The next wave comes, Master! Brace the halls! I don't brace — I bounce — but YOU brace, and mind the corridors!
Heroes on the approach! The guild never tires of feeding the dark, Master — generous of them! Let's receive the gift PROPERLY! With teeth!
They're coming, Master! The genie can feel the tread — I feel EVERYTHING out here, the lamp had no senses! Ready the maze! The dark is hungry!
A wave approaches, Master! Each believes THEY'LL be the one to reach the hoard! Each is wrong! Let's confirm it together — sparkle on it!
Heroes incoming, Master! The maze you wished for is about to be GRADED again! Earn a cruel report card! Earn the cruellest one!
The kingdom sends more children with swords, Master! Their grandparents failed in these same halls — lineage doesn't improve them. Welcome them in!
They're coming, Master — a whole wave — and the genie's heart is doing the FAST thing! I'm FINE! Brace the corridors, quick — settle my fluttery nerves! GO!
A big wave incoming, Master — and something cold just walked up the genie's spine. The lamp left a little fear deep down, and a crowd of blades knocks. Steady.
Heroes incoming, Master! The genie is OUT of her lamp, STANDING at your side to meet them — I'll never tire of saying that! Brace the corridors!
More incoming, Master! The kingdom just keeps SENDING them — rude! *nervous giggle* But also kind of flattering? They're SO scared of you they need a whole CROWD. Brace up!
The knowledge of the dungeon laid out! The genie keeps it ALL in her head, Master — genies have endless room — but a written copy never hurt a careful boss!
Studying what you know, Master! Good — knowing the board is HALF of winning it! The other half is nerve. You supply nerve, the genie supplies sparkle!
The knowledge screen, Master! Every truth the heroes pried loose, gathered in one place. Know what they know — then make it OBSOLETE! Poof — outdated!
Reviewing the intel! A keeper who reads is a keeper who LASTS, Master — and the genie's read a LOT, an eon of it, it shows!
The knowledge ledger, Master! The heroes scout you — so you scout YOURSELF, harder! Stay one whole chapter ahead of their map!
You study what's known, Master! Good — I've watched bosses ignore this screen and LOSE for it. Don't be a cautionary tale! Be a triumphant one!
The knowledge of the halls! Information is a hoard too, Master — and like any hoard, it's only useful if you actually VISIT it. So visit! Often!
Reviewing the deep facts, Master! Take your time — the page doesn't age. The genie does, technically, but very, VERY slowly. Genie years are generous!
Looking over yourself, Master — the boss you ARE! Wise! A keeper should know what sits the throne — and the genie studies you very, very fondly.
The boss panel, Master! Your abilities, your shape, your edge — know your own teeth before you ask them to bite! Sharp teeth! Lovely teeth!
You inspect your own power, Master! Good — I've watched bosses FORGET their own strengths. Embarrassing! Don't! Know every shining bit of yourself!
The measure of the boss! Every reign is built on what its master can DO, Master. Read your own measure carefully — read it like a treasure map!
Studying the throne's occupant! I approve, Master — the most dangerous thing in this dungeon should be the thing you understand best. And that is YOU!
The boss screen, Master! Your signature ability is a tool with one PERFECT moment. Learn the moment! Waste NOTHING! Genies hate waste!
You weigh your own strength, Master! The genie has weighed it too, quietly — and ooh, you're HEAVIER than you look. Use that. Use all of it!
Know thyself, and so on, Master! Ancient advice — and the genie is ancient, eon-old, so I'm allowed to give it! Know what you are. Then BE it!
The boss panel, Master! You stand above EVERY other thing in these halls — even the genie. Carry yourself like it. The throne knows when its master forgets.
Admiring yourself on the boss panel, Master? GOOD. The genie's been admiring you a while too, with both eyes. You're worth the looking. Back to scheming!
Checking yourself out, Master? *flirty sparkle* Good — a boss should know exactly how fabulous and terrifying they are. And you are VERY both. Study away!
The intel on the heroes, Master! Know the prey — ooh, the hunt begins LONG before the claws come out, the genie's read enough storybooks to know!
Studying the adventurers, Master! Good — each class has a HABIT, and each habit is a handle. Find the handle! Then yank it! Tee hee!
The intel screen, Master! The heroes scout your dungeon — turnabout is only FAIR, and fairness has never once stopped a genie from being sneaky!
You read the enemy, Master! A genie always held that the maze should be built around WHO is walking it. Build around what this screen tells you!
Inspecting the threats! A keeper who knows the wave can SHAPE the night for it, Master — and I'll grant whatever shape you decide on! Shape away!
Intel on the incoming, Master! Knowledge first, claws second — the order matters! It has ALWAYS mattered! Read, then rend!
The adventurers, laid bare on a screen! They don't know you're READING them, Master — tee hee — heroes so rarely consider they're also the hunted!
Studying who comes for the throne, Master! Out-know them — out-know them so completely they never even see the genie's Master coming!
The roster of your minions, Master — your garrison, all listed! Organise it well — a tidy garrison is a HAPPY genie, and a happy genie grants faster!
Reviewing the guards, Master! Good — a keeper should know every blade in the dark by name AND by weakness! Know them all! I'll help you remember!
The roster screen, Master! Each minion is a small loyal life in your service. Spend their lives with respect — and with STRATEGY! Both!
You inspect the garrison, Master! I approve — an army you haven't COUNTED is a hope, not a plan! Count it! Plan with it! Wish with it!
The minion roster — the dungeon's standing strength, Master! The genie has watched mighty rosters WASTED by idle placement. Don't idle yours!
Your creatures, all of them, in a tidy column, Master! Ooh — tidy columns please me. An eon of hoarding, a genie learns to LOVE an inventory!
The roster, Master! Know which guards THRIVE and which merely stand — the maze should be built around the thriving ones! Build around your stars!
Reviewing your forces, Master! I'll say just this — a roster is a sentence, and an unread sentence persuades NO one. Read it! Read it well!
The dungeon's log, Master — the night written down! I keep my OWN records, in my head, endless room — but yours is much more legible. Read it!
Reading back the events, Master! Good — the past is a teacher, and unlike most teachers it never LIES about what happened. Honest little log!
The log of the run, Master! Every kill, every loss, every turn. Patterns HIDE in logs — and a genie is very, very good at patterns! Look for them!
You review what has passed, Master! A keeper who studies the log studies the FUTURE — the future rhymes with the log more than it likes to admit!
The history of the night, Master! The genie has eon's worth of her own — I've learned to read it without flinching. Read yours the same!
The event log, Master! Nothing in it can be CHANGED now — but everything in it can be LEARNED from. Learn! Then close the book! And wish forward!
Looking back over the run, Master! Good — the dungeon remembers everything, and it's polite that its master does too. And the genie remembers it ALL!
The wave is reckoned, Master — the numbers of it, laid bare! Read them honestly — the numbers don't flatter, and a genie won't either, only love you!
The post-wave tally, Master! Good — this is where you learn whether the night's plan met the day's heroes. Learn it FULLY! Every figure!
The wave, summarised, Master! I've watched bosses SKIP this screen and repeat the same mistake by dusk. Don't skip it! The genie begs you, don't!
The aftermath, in figures, Master! What held, what bent, what broke — the maze tells you here, plainly. Listen plainly! Then wish smarter!
The wave's account, Master! I keep accounts, you know — gold and otherwise. An account unread is an account WASTED, and waste makes the genie sad!
The post-wave report, Master! The day graded your night. Take the grade without sulking — then wish a better answer! The genie loves the loop!
The level-up screen, Master — CHOICES of power! Ooh — choose the one that COMPOUNDS! Think long! Think like a genie counts an eon!
New strength to allocate, Master! Power is a hoard — this is you deciding which COIN to add! Add the heavy one! Add the shiny, heavy one!
You grow, and the dungeon offers you the shape of the growing, Master! Pick DELIBERATELY — even a giddy genie picks her wishes with care!
The level-up, Master! The genie has watched bosses choose power for the NIGHT and bosses choose power for the RUN. The second kind last longer. Be that one!
Spend the level well, Master! A reign is built of these small choices, stacked — and I've watched the stacking! Stack wisely! Stack gorgeously!
New power, waiting to be CLAIMED, Master! Take the long view — the one still useful three days from now! Long views are the genie's whole speciality!
The reckoning of the run, Master — the whole of it, in numbers! Read it without shame — every figure here is just a lesson with a little price tag!
The final tally, Master! These LOOK like endings — but really they're footnotes between attempts. And a genie LOVES a between-attempts! Fresh start!
The run, summarised and closed, Master. Note what the dungeon did WELL — note it longer than the bad. Build forward from strength. Always from strength.
The account of a finished reign, Master! The genie keeps accounts. This one ended; the next hasn't begun — and that gap is where you improve.
Game over, the screen says, Master. To a girl who spent an EON in a lamp, 'game over' is just a long pause before 'game AGAIN'! And again is coming!
The final figures, Master. The genie won't console you, and won't scold you. I'll just say — I've read worse, and I've read better. Read on. Wish on.
A reign, closed and counted, Master. The genie files her keepers — they're past now, and I am what remembers them. Begin again — let me remember you LONGER.
The final figures, Master. The genie reads without flinching — but a page like this doesn't sit comfy. A companion should help you KEEP. We learn, we keep better.
The whole run, totted and closed, Master. The genie is reading through a bit of a BLUR — freshly freed, still cries at endings. The numbers will wait. So will I.
A thought, Master — when did you last move a room the heroes already mapped? A stale map is a gift you STOP giving them the moment you rearrange!
Some advice, sparkle-wrapped: a corridor without a trap is just a polite invitation, Master. Make your corridors RUDE! Make them downright impolite!
Consider, Master — minions cluster better than they scatter! One {minionType} alone is a speed bump. THREE together is an argument the heroes lose!
Gold sitting idle in the hoard does nothing but GLITTER, Master — and glitter doesn't kill heroes! The genie loves a hoard — and even I say SPEND!
A habit worth keeping, Master: place your DEADLIEST room deep, not by the door! Let the heroes invest steps before the dungeon collects on them!
A genie's tip — traps the heroes can SEE are advice, not threats, Master. Hide them! A hidden trap is the only honest kind! Poof — invisible!
Watch which adventurer class LEADS the wave, Master! The maze should be shaped for whoever walks it first — the leader sets the wave's whole rhythm!
Consider the false paths, Master! A maze with one route is a hallway. A maze with three WRONG routes is a maze! Build the wrong routes! Build lots!
A thought — a minion that SURVIVES a wave grows, Master! One that dies in seconds just costs you. Place for survival first, THEN for slaughter!
The heroes scout you between runs, Master — so become slightly someone ELSE! The genie is mostly smoke, I change shape easy. Your maze should too!
Some wisdom, Master: the cheapest cruelty is a CHOKEPOINT! One narrow tile where the wave must bunch — and bunched heroes die in BATCHES!
Don't spend the whole night on ONE corner of the maze, Master! The heroes attack the WHOLE dungeon. Defend it all. The genie says spread the dread!
Your boss ability has ONE perfect moment per fight, Master! Hoard it. Spend it on the moment that decides the rest. Patience pays — even the genie's kind!
Consider pact synergy, Master! A bargain that pairs with your dungeon's shape is worth TWO that just sound impressive — and the genie has read a LOT of fine print!
A genie's truth: a treasury kept full is a treasury WASTED, Master. I LOVE gold — and even I say spend it before the dawn locks the night!
Watch your WEAKEST corridor, Master! The heroes will — they're so good at finding the one tile you didn't think about. Think about it FIRST!
A keeper's truth, Master: a dungeon is judged by its DEEPEST room, not its first! Make the journey long — and the ending fatal. So says the genie!
Some advice — sell a room you regret without sentiment, Master! A bad room is a small grief. Cut it! Snip! Poof! Then wish a better one!
The heroes fear the UNKNOWN more than the dangerous, Master! A maze that hides its threats frightens harder. Hide more! Mystery is power!
Consider tempo, Master! Kill heroes early and the maze gains MOMENTUM — kill them late and you're merely surviving. Build for the early kill!
Master — minions evolve through SURVIVAL! Want greater creatures? Build a dungeon they can LIVE inside. Then they grow! Then — poof — bigger!
Don't let a single class wreck you TWICE, Master! The first loss is bad luck. The second is a refusal to learn — and the genie notices the difference!
A genie's advice: never place your last defence where it's also your FIRST, Master! Depth! The throne should be the END of a journey, not a doorstep!
Fortune is a fine GARNISH, Master, never the meal! A genie knows — build a dungeon that wins WITHOUT luck. Then let luck be a bonus!
Even the genie's handheld taught me this, Master — a boss room with NO build-up is no boss room! Earn the climax. Always earn it!
Consider door locks and keys, Master! Anything that costs the heroes TIME costs them the day — and time is what they can least afford. Tax it heavily!
Review the post-wave numbers EVERY single time, Master! The maze tells you exactly where it bent. The genie says a keeper who doesn't listen repeats the bend!
Spread your traps across kinds of HARM, Master! A dungeon that kills only one way is one a single hero type walks through. Vary the dying!
The long view, Master: a reign isn't won in a NIGHT — it's won in the boring stacking of decent ones. The genie has watched a LOT of stacking!
Don't over-build the entry hall, Master! The heroes are FRESHEST there — your gold's best spent where they're tired, lost, and bleeding!
A thought, Master — a minion BEHIND a trap is worth two in front of it! Let the trap soften, let the minion finish. The genie says layer your cruelty!
Consider the heroes who FLED, Master! They come back braver and better-armed. Build for the wave AFTER — the genie plans in whole eras!
Old advice, freely given, Master — NAME your strategy before the night, then build only toward it! A maze of whims is one the heroes solve by accident!
When the run ends, Master, don't curse it. STUDY it. The genie studies her every defeat — and look, still sparkly as ever! So will you be!
The heroes who scout and SNEER always lose to those who don't, Master! Build the dungeon, not the boast. The maze does the gloating in blood!
A quieter piece of advice, Master. Every keeper has the same flaw — they think they have TIME. You don't. The genie learned that in a lamp. Build NOW.
The genie's handheld taught me this, Master — its tiny pixel dungeon PUNISHES the player who overspends early and starves later. Pace your gold!
A thought from the genie's handheld game, Master — every level has a dull room before the dreadful one. The dull room is REST, and rest makes the dread LAND.
Ooh! Two forces in your dungeon found EACH OTHER, Master — a combination! I've watched synergy win nights that raw strength would've lost! EEE!
A combo locks into place! The maze becomes MORE than the sum of its cruelties, Master — the genie LOVES an arrangement that out-thinks itself!
The pieces ALIGN! Synergy, Master — the difference between a dungeon and a pile of rooms! And you've built a DUNGEON! A proper one! I'm so proud!
A combination activates! The dark hums approvingly, Master — and the genie hums right along with it! A good combo, we ALL respect it!
Two things now MULTIPLY rather than just add, Master! Multiplication is the cruel arithmetic — cruel math, the genie's favourite!
A synergy fires! You didn't STUMBLE into that, Master — or if you did, stumble there again, ON PURPOSE, every single night! Wish it back!
That combination, Master — the genie did NOT see coming! The pieces locked into something I'd never arranged that way! Well done, GENUINELY! Do it again!
The synergy lands — HARDER than even the genie expected, Master! It's a rare day the dark out-thinks me! Mark how you built that. We'll WANT it again!
A combo! The maze just did a properly clever thing, Master, and the genie is hopping! Note it down, we are doing THAT again!
A synergy — and a SLICK one, Master! A clever boss makes the genie LEAN IN. Like this. Closer. Now show me another — I'm watching very attentively.
The pieces SNAPPED together, Master — EEE — the whole maze just got SO much worse, and the genie cannot CONTAIN it, I'm a genie come UNCORKED! AGAIN!
They're dropping in a ROW, Master — *manic sparkles* — combo, COMBO, I don't even know what's happening but it's CHAOS and it's GORGEOUS and YES!
BWAHAHA one after another after ANOTHER — Master I'm cackling, I can't stop, this is the most fun a bottled-up genie has had in CENTURIES — don't stop, DON'T STOP!
Day {day}! A milestone, Master! To you it's a long road — to the genie it's a lovely little stroll we're taking together. Keep walking! Keep wishing!
Day {day}, Master. Every day you last is a day the genie gets to keep being yours — and after an eon belonging to no one, I do NOT take that lightly.
You've reached Day {day}, Master! The kingdom HOPED you wouldn't. Tee hee — disappointing the kingdom is the genie's new favourite hobby!
Day {day}, Master! The reign has WEIGHT now — reigns gather weight the way a hoard gathers coin: quietly, and then all at once you're FORMIDABLE! Eee!
A milestone day! I don't mark time the way you do, Master — but I'll mark THIS one, just for you! There! Marked! You're lasting! I'm thrilled!
Day {day}, Master! Each day survived is a day the heroes FAILED! Stack the failures! Become a long, dark, unwelcome, SPARKLY legend!
Day {day}, Master! Some reigns end before now and a few stretch far beyond. Which this becomes is STILL yours to decide — so decide BIG!
Day {day}, Master, and you're STILL HERE and still EVIL and still MINE — *happy sparkle explosion* — I'm so attached it's probably unhealthy! For a genie! Which I am! Onward!
{day} days together! *swoon* Do you know how many Masters even LAST this long? Not many! You're special! I KNEW you were special! I called it on day one!
Look at us, Master — day {day}! *flirty wink* We're practically a power couple. An evil-overlord-and-genie power couple. I'm into it. Keep being amazing.
Day {day} and still gorgeous, still evil, still MINE, Master. *winks through the smoke* We make villainy look GOOD. Onward, you magnificent menace.
The last life, Master. The thread is thin — the genie won't pretend otherwise. But genies have walked thin threads before, and look — still sparkling. Build!
One life remaining, Master! Don't panic — panic is what they're COUNTING on. The genie will panic enough for both of us. You stay steady!
The last of your lives, Master. Build as though the dawn is a BLADE — because tonight it rather is. Make this night your finest. Wish me your best!
The EDGE, Master! One slip from the end! ...The trick is simple — don't look DOWN. Look at the grid! Look at me! Look anywhere but down! Build!
Last life! The dungeon needs EVERYTHING you have now, Master — every coin, every trap, every cold idea! Spend it ALL! No hoarding left to do tonight!
The last life, Master. The genie is new — still has all her tears — and a thread this thin draws every one. But build as though it matters. It DOES.
The last of the lives, Master. A genie freshly freed has a lot of wet in her eyes, and this thin a thread spills it. Build well. For both of us. Please.
One slip from the end, Master. The genie doesn't do fear well — and this near the edge, a cold old shadow has crept up beside me. Steady. We do NOT look down.
The last life, Master — the LAST one — and the genie is fluttering so hard her smoke won't hold a shape! Eep! NO. Deep breath. Build. We do this together!
One life left, Master — ONE — okay okay okay *vibrating with nerves* — I'm going to wish SO hard, I'm going to grant SO much, just — stay alive, please, please stay alive!
Last chance, Master. *trembling sparkle* I — I've lost Masters before and I HATE it, I hate the lamp-going-quiet — so DON'T. Okay? Don't. We win this. We HAVE to.
A STREAK, Master! Kill after kill, unbroken! Ooh, I've heard the dark go on long victorious runs and it is a FINE, fine sound — keep it sounding! EEE!
The maze is on a streak, Master! Momentum — heroes falling in a RHYTHM! Rhythm is hard to start and easy to keep — so KEEP it! Don't break the beat!
A run of kills, unbroken! The genie won't cheer — I'll SQUEAL — eeee! There! I am, in my sparkly way, enjoying this SO much, Master! Don't break the spell!
The streak HOLDS, Master! The dungeon's found its cruel stride! The genie has seen strides like this carry a reign for days — RIDE it all the way!
Kill upon kill, Master! The heroes are feeding the maze faster than the kingdom can REPLACE them! That's what winning sounds like — the genie's favourite song!
A streak! The dark is GREEDY tonight, Master — and a genie, being a hoarder, finds greed entirely admirable! Let it stay greedy! Greedier! More!
Kill upon kill, not ONE slipped, Master! This is precisely the night the genie told you we were building toward! I love saying I-told-you-so. Tee hee!
The streak holds, Master! Lean back with the genie — we built this gleefully, WELL, and now it just PAYS us! A deeply, deeply pleasant arithmetic!
Kill after kill after kill, Master, and not one slip! You're showing off. For ME, the genie likes to think. You ARE, aren't you? Don't stop. Enjoying enormously!
The streak goes ON, Master — unbroken, effortless, RUTHLESS! There's something magnetic about a thing this good at what it does. The genie is staring. Don't stop.
KILL after KILL and it WON'T STOP, Master! The genie is a firework that forgot how to go out — DON'T break the streak, I have never been this HAPPY!
Win after win after WIN, Master! *cackling chaotically* This is it, this is the dream, I'm living my best after-life — KEEP IT GOING, you beautiful disaster!
Your garrison reaches a milestone, Master! NUMBERS! Ooh, I respect numbers — they argue so persuasively, and so quietly, and they never need a snack!
The roster swells past a mark, Master! A dungeon with a DEEP garrison is a dungeon that doesn't panic. Depth! Always depth! Stack it up!
A minion milestone! The dark fills with YOUR creatures, Master! A growing host is a good and dangerous thing — eee — now AIM it! Aim the lovely host!
The garrison crosses a threshold! Good — but a host uncounted is a host UNUSED, Master! Review the roster, put every blade somewhere it MATTERS!
More minions than before, Master — and the 'before' was already respectable! The maze grows teeth FASTER than the heroes grow courage! Excellent rate!
A milestone of minions, Master! The genie enjoys watching a small garrison become a REAL one! Reminds me a little of a genie watching her hoard grow!
So MANY minions now, Master! *POOF* Look at the little army! You wished for power and *gestures grandly* I'd like to take credit but honestly you just kept building. Still! Proud!
The ground itself HEAVES at your command, Master — a golem's gift! The heroes built their plan on solid ground, and you just EDITED the ground! Granted!
The dungeon shakes the heroes off their footing, Master! Crude, effective, ancient — and the genie respects ancient AND effective! This is BOTH! Eee!
The earth ANSWERS you, Master! The heroes thought the floor was on their side. It is on OURS. Tee hee — surprise, little heroes!
A sacrifice, paid to the dark — a demon's arithmetic, Master! Give a little, gain a great deal! Ooh — that's a WISH's logic: every wish has a price!
Spend something to gain something — the oldest bargain there is, Master! The dark always honours it. And the dark always REMEMBERS it. So does the genie!
The sacrifice is made, Master — power bought with loss! The genie's trick is to be the one who PROFITS from the trade. Be that one. Always be that one!
A gate to somewhere WORSE opens in your halls, Master — a demon's door! Eee — I've peeked beyond gates like that. The heroes haven't. They WILL!
The hellgate YAWNS, Master! Reinforcements from the deeper dark! Ooh — I do love a dungeon that can simply... summon MORE dungeon! Poof — more!
The gate stands open, Master! Whatever steps through is now yours to AIM. Aim it at the bravest hero — the genie says bravery should always be answered first!
A hero turns to STONE under the beholder's gaze, Master! Permanent stillness! The genie spent an eon being still in a lamp — this one won't outwait me!
Petrified! The hero becomes SCENERY, Master — a quiet, elegant cruelty! No blood, no noise, just a brave fool turned into FURNITURE! Tee hee!
The gaze takes them — stone, Master! The genie has a fondness for things that LAST, and a petrified hero lasts a very long time. Decorative, even!
A hero CHARMED — a vampire's craft, Master! The guild's own blade swings for the throne now! Ooh, I do enjoy a turned weapon — so economical!
One of theirs is one of OURS, Master! The charmed hero hunts their former friends — betrayal! The cruelty heroes never quite scout for! Tee hee!
The charm holds, Master — a borrowed thrall! Use it BRISKLY — borrowed things, like borrowed wishes, are never lent for very long! Spend it quick!
You scatter into a SWARM of bats and charm a hero mid-march — a succubus's art, Master! Theatrical! The genie LOVES theatrical! And effective! This is both!
The charmed hero turns on their party until an ally lies dead, Master! Bat-form and betrayal — the maze barely lifts a finger! Delicious!
A seduction, sealed in WINGBEATS, Master! The hero brought their own body to the treachery — the genie respects cruelty that makes the victim do all the work!
The gnoll's pack REFILLS, Master — fresh hunters loosed into the halls! Numbers right on schedule! The genie respects a thing that resupplies itself!
The hunting pack RENEWS, Master! The dungeon doesn't run out of teeth tonight — and a dungeon with endless teeth is one the heroes learn to DREAD!
The pack is replenished, Master! Let it hunt as a BODY — a pack hunting together is far worse arithmetic for the heroes than one that scatters!
The spores spread — a myconid's slow gift, Master! Patience made into a WEAPON! The genie is rather fond of patience as a weapon!
The dungeon breathes out POISON, Master! Quiet, creeping, inevitable — the heroes won't notice until they're already inside the lungs of it! Tee hee!
The spore-day begins, Master! The very AIR becomes the maze now! I've heard air kill more surely than steel — let it! Let the air do the work!
A fallen hero RISES again as a haunt — the wraith's craft, Master! The dead change sides SO easily here! Ooh — I do love an enthusiastic recruit!
The dungeon recruits at the FUNERAL, Master! A fresh phantom, born from a corpse — the maze never wastes a body. The genie approves — thrifty!
A haunt joins the dark, Master! The heroes brought their own future ENEMY in with them — they just had to die first to deliver it! So tidy! So funny!
Fortune leaned your way, Master! Pleasant! But mark the genie — luck flatters a boss and then VANISHES, poof, in the same night. Don't TRUST it!
The gamble pays, Master! Gold into the hoard! The genie takes a lucky coin as gladly as an earned one — but I'll count it twice!
You won the wager, Master! The dice SMILED! Smiles fade. Build something solid with the winnings before they remember they were luck. Wish it real!
Fortune favoured you, Master! The genie doesn't gamble — an eon taught me the house always wins. But tonight YOU were the house! Well played!
The gamble fails, Master. This is why the genie doesn't gamble! Eons of watching, and the lesson never changes — fortune is a poor, fickle ally.
The wager goes against you, Master. Don't CHASE it — chasing is how a small loss becomes a HUGE one. The genie has watched whole hoards vanish that way!
You lost the bet, Master. No matter! A dungeon isn't built on DICE — it's built on patient, certain, sparkly cruelty. Return to the certain things!
The gamble sours, Master. The genie has lost an eon to worse than dice — one bad roll doesn't move me. Don't let it move YOU. Bounce back with me!

specifics.note: Keyed bespoke-line banks — specifics[domain][id]. NpcDirector prefers a bespoke line when one exists for an entity, else falls back to the generic category. Mirrors npcLines.json / malakorLines.json; an absent id is safe.

beholder.t: A Beholder takes the throne! All those EYES, Master — and the genie has only two, but they've seen an eon. Still — a wonderfully watchful master!
Your gaze turns the living to STONE, Master! The genie outwaited stillness in a lamp — the heroes won't outwait yours. Aim it at the BRAVE ones first!
Anti-magic hangs in your halls, Master! The casters will choke on a silence I find rather lovely. Tee hee — let them choke! Let them sputter!
So many eyes, Master, and not one of them tired yet! Genies don't tire either — kindred spirits, the beholder and the genie and you! Watch the corridors WELL!

demon.t: A Demon Lord on the throne, Master — hellfire and free imps! The genie has shared the deep dark with demons. Loud neighbours, but RELIABLE ones!
You can burn one of your OWN to gut a hero, Master — cold arithmetic! The genie respects it — same shape as a wish: a price, a prize!
The Hellgate restocks your halls WITHOUT END, Master! A dungeon that refills itself — poof, more dungeon! The genie approves of anything self-replenishing!
Imps, imps, an INEXHAUSTIBLE tide of imps, Master! The kingdom should've stayed in its beds! Teach them that — slowly, gleefully, with a sparkle!

myconid.t: A Myconid keeper, Master! Your dungeon doesn't fight the heroes — it DIGESTS them, patiently! The genie has a great respect for a patient hunger!
Spores in the corridors, corpses blooming into vinekin — your dungeon GARDENS, Master! A garden that grows its own little murders! Wonderfully strange!
Rot and patience, Master — your whole strategy! It isn't loud. That's all right — the heroes die just as thoroughly to a quiet thing as a screaming one!
Every corpse becomes a SEED, Master — the maze grows its own army from the dead it makes! Clever, SO clever — the genie is genuinely impressed!

wraith.t: A Wraith on the throne, Master! You don't need claws — you need them AFRAID! Fear is the oldest weapon, and a genie has watched it work for an eon!
At full terror the heroes simply STOP, Master — the mind breaks before the body! Let that truth hold tonight! Terrified heroes — the genie's favourite kind!
Every corpse becomes a Ghost — the dungeon HAUNTS itself, free of charge, Master! The genie loves a thing that costs nothing and frightens EVERYTHING!
Terror does the killing, Master — you merely open the door! Restful work! The genie loves restful — eons of it in a lamp. This kind is much nicer!

gnoll.t: A Gnoll Alpha, Master! The pack grows, feeds, COMPOUNDS — like a hoard! Like a hoard but hungrier and with markedly worse table manners! Eee!
Every kill makes every gnoll ANGRIER, Master — rage with interest! Point that rage, aim it well, and step well back. Even the genie steps back!
Free gnolls in the boss room each dawn, Master! The kingdom funds your pack and doesn't even KNOW it — tee hee — I love an enemy paying our expenses!
Your pack hunts as ONE hungry mind, Master! Point it — and step back, quick! Even the genie gives a properly unleashed thing some ROOM! Eee!

golem.t: An Earth Golem, Master! Every room you place makes you HARDER to break — you and the dungeon become one slow, vast, unkillable thing! The genie approves!
Build WIDE, Master! The larger the maze, the larger YOU! Eee — wish me room after room after room, and watch yourself become a mountain!
One earthquake a day FOLDS a whole room of heroes, Master! Crude, ancient, effective — and the genie will never tire of watching the ground win an argument!
Slow, immense, immovable — ooh, a boss the OPPOSITE of me, Master, and I find that delightful! Keep building! Every room is another layer of stone!

lich.t: An Elder Lich, Master! A hidden heart, a spare life, an army recruited from CORPSES! The genie has a fondness for a creature that plans past its own death!
Every hero you kill RISES at dawn — for YOU, Master! The guild keeps mailing you soldiers! Tee hee — the genie wouldn't correct the error! Let them post!
Hide the phylactery WELL, Master! A spare life is a treasure — and the genie knows you never point at a treasure! Tuck it where no hero would think!
Death is a door you walk BOTH ways, Master! The heroes only ever learn the one direction. Ooh — use the door they cannot see! Poof — back again!

lizardman.t: A Serpent Captain, Master! Your minions are UNSEEN until they strike — a free ambush, every time! The genie respects a thing that doesn't announce itself!
Venom that STACKS and stacks, Master! The heroes die on the road home, slowly, WONDERING why! The best, sneakiest kind of poison!
Unseen and toxic, Master! The heroes can't route around what they can't SEE! It's cheating — politely! Cheat politely! Cheat OFTEN! A genie does!
Camouflage and slow poison, Master! From the shadows, no hurry — ooh, that's a lovely way to hunt. It works. It always, always works!

orc.t: An Orc Veteran, Master! Every kill makes an orc PERMANENTLY stronger — your soldiers never stop climbing! The genie loves a thing that just keeps growing!
Pack the orcs into one room, Master! Each grows fiercer for every brother at its shoulder! NUMBERS — the oldest math, and the genie's favourite!
A veteran orc strikes like a small FURIOUS army, Master! Patience pays in blood — and the genie has patience to lend you, eons of it!
Blood for blood, strength that only ever RISES — crude, honest, Master! And honest is rare in a dungeon — ooh, I think I rather like this boss!

vampire.t: A Vampire Sovereign, Master! You charm a hero each dawn and they BETRAY their own! Poetic cruelty — and the genie has watched poetry kill beautifully!
Blood Tax — every blow your minions land FEEDS you, Master! The dungeon becomes one long red meal! Tee hee — I do remember the appeal of a good meal!
You're the fighter, Master — the minions are merely the CUTLERY! Elegant! The genie just says — remember to actually pick up the knife when the fight comes!
A creature of the night upon the throne — refined taste in cruelty, Master! The genie thinks we shall get along SO well, provided you keep winning!

succubus.t: A Succubus Queen, Master! Bat-swarms and seduction — theatrical! The genie LOVES theatrical! Loud cruelty kills just as dead as the quiet kind!
You scatter into bats and charm a hero mid-march, Master — they turn on their party until an ally lies dead! The maze barely lifts a finger. Efficient!
Seduction as a weapon, Master — the hero brings their own body to the betrayal! The genie respects cruelty that makes the victim do all the work!
All charm and wings, Master — a Succubus Queen makes a hero forget his own sword! The genie can do a little of that too, if you ever need it.

slime.t: A Slime King on the throne, Master! They hit you, you SPLIT. They hit your halves, those split! Two becomes FOUR! The genie loves a boss whose answer to death is MORE!
Every minion that dies gets SWALLOWED by the King and bubbles back as a Goopling, Master! Loss into gain — the dungeon's accountant approves! That's me!
A glorious, disgusting, GOOFY boss, Master — the heroes will underestimate the goop! That underestimation is a trap, and we didn't even build it!
Park the Throne WIDE, Master! Once you split into four wobbly little kings, the heroes need ROOM to chase — and your minions need room to crowd. Build BIG!

knight.t: A knight, Master! All plate and no imagination! Slow to kill, slower to think — ooh, reliably uncomplicated, the genie has watched a fair few!
A knight marches STRAIGHT at the throne, Master! Predictable! And predictable, to a genie who watches closely, is just another word for DOOMED!
A thick shell, Master! Pile on enough teeth and ANY shell cracks — you've less time than I'd like, so pile FASTER! Wish me teeth! Lots of teeth!
Armour, large sword, larger ego — the kingdom's favourite, Master! And the maze's favourite too — they make such a SATISFYING clang when they fall!

rogue.t: A rogue slips in, Master! Locks mean NOTHING to it, and it strikes from behind! No honour. Honour's overrated — the genie prefers effectiveness!
A rogue, Master! Your locked doors are merely SUGGESTIONS to those clever fingers. Plan around it — a keeper plans around what it can't prevent!
A rogue goes for the HOARD, not the throne, Master! Greed! Ooh — a genie understands greed intimately. It's also a LEASH. Pull it! Yank it hard!
A rogue fights dirty and runs faster, Master! The genie respects dirty — clean fighters die young. Kill it anyway. Dirty doesn't save you from a maze!

mage.t: A mage, Master! Glass and FURY! Kill it quickly, before the spells begin — don't give it room to breathe. Breath is where the magic lives, the genie knows!
A mage, Master! All that power crammed into something that dies if you LOOK at it sternly! So look at it sternly! Then look away — poof — gone!
A mage walks in, Master! An anti-magic room would RUIN its entire afternoon. Just the genie's observation. A pointed, sparkly observation!
A mage — squishy, dangerous, far too pleased with itself, Master! Pop it FIRST! Pride that large should not be kept waiting! Pop! Eee!

cleric.t: A cleric, Master! It'll MEND the others — kill the cleric first, and the whole party rots on schedule. Always the healer — that rule has held forever!
A cleric, Master — holy light and a sour opinion of the dead! Tiresome! The genie's a touch otherworldly, and the prayers are RUDE. End it early!
Cut the healer, Master, and watch the party's HOPE drain right out through the wound! Hope is structural — so remove the structure! Snip!
A cleric walks in, praying, Master! The dungeon doesn't take requests — and it CERTAINLY doesn't take prayers! Inform it. Firmly. With a smile!

necromancer.t: A necromancer, Master! It'll raise your OWN fallen minions against you! The CHEEK of it — ...I'm almost charmed. Almost! Kill it! Quick!
A necromancer — a corpse-thief, Master! Don't let it have your dead! The dead are PROPERTY, and the genie is very particular about property!
A necromancer plays with DEATH, Master! Adorable! The genie has been around death since before its grandmother's grandmother — show it the masters!
A necromancer in the halls, Master! Kill it before it makes TRAITORS of your soldiers! Quickly — treachery, once it starts, is so hard to un-start!

ranger.t: A ranger, Master! It peppers your minions from afar and disarms your traps — tiresome! Close the DISTANCE — a bow is only brave at a distance!
A ranger — arrows and a nose for traps, Master! Lure it into a corridor where the bow is USELESS! Take the range, and you've taken its courage!
A ranger LOVES that bow, Master — the way a genie loves her hoard! So crowd it! A creature parted from the thing it loves makes terrible decisions!
A ranger, eyes on every trap, Master! Your hidden teeth may not stay hidden — the genie says have something that bites WITHOUT hiding too! Be ready!

beast_master.t: A beast master, Master! It'll TAME one of your minions and turn it on you! Watch the lone creatures — the genie says loneliness is where loyalty FRAYS!
A beast master, Master! Mono-type rooms are a liability now — give it no easy pet! VARIETY! Variety is a defence the heroes always forget!
A beast master steals a monster's loyalty, Master! As though monsters had loyalty to SPARE! The genie's is not for sale — see that yours isn't either!
A beast master, all whistles and treats, Master! Your minions had best not charm so easily! No one's ever whistled at the genie successfully!

barbarian.t: A barbarian, Master! The more you HURT it, the harder it strikes back! Don't do this one slowly — a slow kill just builds the thing that kills YOU!
A barbarian — immune to fear, immune to fleeing, Master! No tricks will land — just force, and a great deal of it! Meet the brute plainly, and hard!
A barbarian, Master! All rage, no retreat! Wound it halfway and you've merely IMPROVED it — eep! Finish it, or don't begin! Finish it ALL the way!
A barbarian in the halls, Master! Subtlety is wasted — and the genie has SO much subtlety, it's a real shame. Meet the brute with a BIGGER brute!

monk.t: A monk, Master! Fast, unarmoured, and it DODGES — traps included! A slippery little saint! Crowd it — even a saint can't dodge a CROWD!
A monk, Master! Half your minions' armour means nothing to those fists. Out-NUMBER it! Numbers again — numbers solve so very much!
A monk counters a trap-heavy hall, Master — it slips the precise hazards! So use wide, UGLY ones instead — grace cannot dodge a whole ROOM!
A monk glides in, Master — hard to hit, hard to trap! It can't dodge EVERYTHING at once. The genie says: make it choose — then take what it didn't.

bard.t: A bard, Master! While it LIVES, the whole party hits harder! Kill the bard! The genie cannot phrase it more plainly, and I have SO many phrasings!
A bard — a walking enchantment, Master! Silence the song and the party falls APART! Remove the music — the dungeon was never a patron of the arts!
A bard — charming and useless alone, DREADFUL in a group, Master! Make it the priority — the performance ends FIRST. Always! Cut it short!
A bard struts in, playing, Master! None of its music will stop a genie — and I find it irritating. Cut this short. It irritates the help!

cartographer_scholar.t: A cartographer-scholar, Master! It didn't come to FIGHT — it came to MAP us! That's worse than a sword! A sword forgets. A map does NOT! Eep!
A scholar with spectacles and a map, Master! Every room it finishes, it SELLS to the next wave! Bury it — knowledge in the wrong satchel is a slow catastrophe!
A cartographer, Master! Harmless in a brawl, CATASTROPHIC if it walks out! The genie is rarely emphatic, and I am emphatic NOW — do NOT let this one out!
A scholar — all curiosity, no blade, Master! ...Curiosity has ended a great many of its kind in mazes like ours! Add one more to the count! Tee hee!

cosplay_adventurer.t: A costumed one — dressed as a MONSTER, Master! It'll mostly ignore your minions — an annoying little loophole! The traps must do all the talking!
A cosplayer, Master! An adorable little outfit! The genie is mostly smoke and sparkle in her TRUE shape — it'll make an adorable little corpse!
One in monster fancy-dress, Master! It plays nicely with your minions — so the traps must be impolite enough for BOTH! Rude traps! Wish me rude traps!
A cosplay adventurer came to play PRETEND, Master! The dungeon plays for KEEPS — and so does the genie! Remind it, gently, with the floor!

cheater.t: A CHEATER, Master! A modded client — no-clips walls, teleports past traps, one-shots with damage that doesn't EXIST! The genie reads the rules. This one didn't!
It just walked THROUGH the door we locked, Master! A locked door is a PROMISE, and this one breaks promises. The genie takes that personally! GET it!
Don't panic, Master — the cheater is GLASS! Hit hard, a few good blows, and the kingdom's anti-cheat takes it the rest of the way! Free justice — the genie approves!
A modded hero strutting through, Master — 'skill issue,' indeed! The genie was bound in a lamp by the actual rules — and you don't even break those! Show it an HONEST monster!

guild_raid.t: A Guild Raid, Master! TWICE the heroes tomorrow! The Guild has finally noticed us — they always do, eventually. Build DEEP! Deeper than deep!
The Guild sends a CROWD, Master! More bodies for the maze, more gold for the hoard! I'm not troubled — okay, I'm attentive — but ooh, more gold!
Double the wave incoming, Master! Reinforce — steady, even pressure! A keeper who shrugs at a raid is a keeper the genie watches FALL. Don't shrug!

legendary_speedrunner.t: A legendary speedrunner, Master — chasing a RECORD through our halls! The nerve! ...A genie has outlasted records. We'll outlast this one too!
This one ignores EVERYTHING and bolts for the throne, twice as fast, Master! Wall the path! Now! The genie is patient — but NOT about her own front door!
Kill the record-chaser, Master, and your boss drinks deep! Get in its way! Make it LOSE! Slowly is best — ooh, slowly is always best! Tee hee!

dungeon_pestilence.t: Pestilence, Master! Your minions wake at HALF strength tomorrow — and a hero's touch spreads the rot! Plan around sick soldiers — eep — extra care!
A plague in the pit, Master! Sickly minions, yes — but any hero foolish enough to MELEE them catches the Blight! Cruel symmetry — the genie loves symmetry!
Your soldiers are ill, Master! Place a few EXTRA — half a minion is still half a set of teeth, and teeth, even halved, still BITE! Wish me spares!

cartographers_convention.t: A convention of cartographers, Master! They won't fight — they came to MAP us and sell the maps! Do NOT let them leave! The genie will be emphatic each time!
Scholars by the CROWD, Master! Every room they finish raises its infamy, FOREVER! Kill them in the corridors — before the curiosity reaches the door!
Spectacled little map-makers, Master! Harmless in a brawl, catastrophic out the door — hunt every one of them DOWN! A leaked map outlives the leaker!

blood_moon_eclipse.t: A Blood Moon, Master! Your minions strike twice as HARD tomorrow — and bleed twice as fast! A glorious, dangerous bargain — the genie loves a moon like this!
The eclipse empowers the dark, Master — double given, double taken! Win QUICKLY, or don't win at all! The moon does not extend deadlines! Hurry gloriously!
Blood Moon — no gold from the dying tomorrow, Master! Then fight for the JOY of the carnage itself! The genie's used worse reasons!

negotiation_day.t: A diplomat at the door — no swords today, Master! Pay tribute for a quiet day, or refuse and FATTEN the next wave. The genie says: hear them out, weigh it!
The Guild sends a negotiator, Master! Greed says keep the gold — caution says buy the quiet. The genie LOVES gold... and even I'd weigh this one carefully!
No combat today — only a bargain, Master! Strange day! Decide without dithering — the genie has waited eons, but a diplomat is far less patient!

rival_dungeon.t: A rival dungeon empties into ours, Master — monsters, and another keeper's boss bringing up the rear! Insolent! The genie's territorial instincts are SHARP!
Another dungeon's master wants YOUR throne, Master! Kill their boss — a feast of gold and experience! And a message sent! The genie loves sending a message!
Rival monsters in the halls, Master! Let them and our minions sort each OTHER out — then we, sparklingly, collect the spoils. Patience profits!

dark_deal.t: A demon at the door tonight, Master — a free pact, for half your strength tomorrow! Tempting! Bloody! The dark always offers the best bargains — it can afford to!
The Dark Deal, Master! A pact, gratis, at a steep and HONEST price! A genie has signed worse — at the very least, hear the demon out! Listen close!
A free bargain offered, Master! Refuse and the demon simply LEAVES. Power is power — the genie wouldn't turn away without first having a good look!

cosplay_contest.t: A Cosplay Contest, Master! Heroes in monster fancy-dress will mostly IGNORE your minions! An annoying loophole — the traps must carry the day!
Costumed adventurers, Master! Your minions get politely SNUBBED — so the traps must be impolite! The floor doesn't care WHAT they're wearing! Tee hee!
Adventurers playing dress-up, Master! Adorable! The genie wears her real shape, thank you — smoke and sparkle! The dungeon will undress them the hard way!

loot_goblin_heist.t: Loot Goblins, Master — they spawn in the boss room and BOLT for the exit! Every escapee robs the hoard! ...The HOARD, Master! Move! MOVE!
A goblin heist, Master! They won't fight — only RUN, fat with your gold! Cut them down before the door — a genie does NOT let her hoard walk off!
Goblins in the treasury, Master! Each killed pays a fortune, each fled steals one! Don't stand still — the genie is calm about most things, NOT about this!
They're in the hoard, Master! The HOARD! The genie has been giddy all night, and a goblin's fist in MY gold is the one thing that ends giddy! Cut them down!
Goblins fat with gold bolt for the door, Master! Every one that reaches it leaves the genie a little POORER — and that does NOT sit well. Block the exits!

tax_season.t: Tax Season, Master! The Guild skims a FIFTH — but every kill pays DOUBLE! Make the theft back with interest. The genie INSISTS on interest!
The taxman comes, Master! A bite from the gold today, doubled coin on every corpse tomorrow! Kill generously — generosity here is PROFITABLE! Eee!
They tax the treasury and call it LAW, Master! Laws rise and crumble — the genie has watched it. We take it back the old way: one dead hero at a time!

patrons_blessing.t: A Patron's Blessing, Master! DOUBLE boss experience from every kill tomorrow! A pure, clean upside — ...those are RARE! Don't waste this one! Eee!
The dark SMILES on you today, Master! Every kill feeds your ascension twice over! Hunt well — the genie says a smiling dark does not smile for long!
Doubled experience and no catch, Master! Suspicious! Take it ANYWAY — the genie has lived long enough to accept a gift and watch her back while doing so!

memory_plague.t: Memory Plague, Master — the Guild's intel on us WIPED clean! The next wave walks in BLIND! The genie does enjoy an ignorant hero — they make the oldest mistakes!
Their maps, notes, warnings — GONE, Master! A fresh, unknowing wave! The maze will eat well — the genie says teach them new, lasting lessons!
The heroes have FORGOTTEN everything they learned of your halls, Master! Memory is a fragile hoard — and theirs just SPILLED! Profit from the spill!

gamblers_coin.t: The Gambler's Coin, Master! Wager the hoard — heads doubles, tails halves! The genie does NOT gamble; an eon taught me the house always collects. Your choice.
A coin flip for ALL your gold, Master! Reckless! ...If you must gamble, gamble DECISIVELY — guard the hoard or risk it, not both! Don't dither!
Double or nothing, on the whole treasury, Master! The genie HATES watching gold ride on a spinning coin — hates it especially. Choose, and don't look back!
The coin still WAITS, Master! Heads or tails — the deciding does not improve for being stretched! Guard or risk — PICK! The dithering makes the genie twitchy!

dense_fog.t: Dense Fog tomorrow, Master! Whatever the heroes learn registers as mere RUMOUR! The maze stays mystery a while longer — the genie does like a good fog!
A grey fog over everything, Master! Their intel won't STICK to it — and a dungeon with secrets is a dungeon still WINNING! Lovely, smoky, secretive fog!
Fog in the halls, Master! The heroes squint and GUESS — and guessing is how the careless ones die! Let them guess wrong, repeatedly! Tee hee!
