miasma.t: Creeping Miasma, Master! A green rot that bleeds EVERYTHING — invaders, minions, and you! Win quickly, or the dungeon devours us along with them! Eep!
The miasma picks NO sides, Master! It whittles the heroes — and gnaws at the throne too! Don't linger — even the genie wouldn't linger in THIS! Move!
A poison haze fills the dungeon, Master! Cruel to them, unkind to US — risk weighted heavily. Move with PURPOSE — quick and clever, says the genie!

tremors.t: Tremors tomorrow, Master! The dungeon SHUDDERS — a random room struck every few breaths! The maze itself joins the fight — the genie respects that!
The earth won't sit STILL, Master! Quakes lethal to invaders, merely rude to your minions — USE it! The ground, properly aimed, is an excellent ally!
Shaking halls, Master! The dungeon has OPINIONS today — let it voice them! Loudly! Into the heroes! Eee — a dungeon with opinions, how exciting!

arcane_storm.t: An Arcane Storm, Master! The heroes' casters fire WITHOUT rest tomorrow — cooldowns gutted! Kill the mages first! FIRST — the genie is being precise!
Magic CRACKLES in the very air, Master! Every caster grows greedy with spells. Brace the front line — and end the casters before the greed compounds!
A storm of the arcane, Master! Your own powers stand UNTOUCHED — lucky us! Their mages won't be. End them fast, before the sky does the genie's job badly!

bounty_hunters.t: Bounty Hunters, Master — a pack of FIVE, all hunting your strongest minion! Fame has a price — pay it in THEIR blood, not your champion's!
Five hunters, one target — your finest soldier, Master! Wall them OFF it, or lose the best blade in the dark! The genie's lost good things to carelessness. Don't!
The Guild's put coin on your champion's head, Master! The genie's had coin on hers — none of those hunters ever collected. Make THESE collect nothing!
Five of them, paid to gut your finest minion, Master! The genie takes a cold, sparkling DISLIKE to anyone who'd snap a good blade for a fee. Wall them off!

zombie_horde.t: A Zombie Horde, Master — fourteen slow, witless, fearless dead shambling for the throne! Grind them in a corridor — slowness is only weak if you let them SPREAD!
Undead by the dozen, Master! Weak — but they never flee and never stop. Build a kill-corridor! The genie can out-relentless ANYTHING!
A shamble of corpses tomorrow, Master! The maze LOVES a slow target — so do the traps! Let the dungeon feast at its own gleeful pace! Tee hee!

infamy_spike.t: An Infamy Spike, Master! Tomorrow's wave is LARGER and every hero upgraded to elite! This is the price of being feared — and the genie pays it gladly!
Our reputation precedes us, Master — a swollen wave of gold-ringed ELITES! Build like you mean it — fame is a debt, and the elites are here to collect!
Fame draws the strong, Master — a whole wave of true Heroes! Flattering! Now EARN the flattery — reinforce DEEP! The genie says wish big, build bigger!

black_market.t: A Black Market opens tonight, Master! Fifty gold for a FREE minion, delivered to your halls! That's a STEAL — the genie knows a steal! Take it!
The Black Market beckons, Master! Cheap muscle if you have the coin. The genie'd spend — an extra body is an extra wall, and walls keep a keeper alive!
Fifty gold, one free wretch, Master! The dark runs a tidy little shop! Spend — a hoard exists to be spent at the RIGHT moment, and this is one! Poof!

mercenary_contract.t: A Mercenary Contract, Master! A hundred-twenty gold buys an elite — but it fights only THREE days! Expensive courage — weigh it the way the genie weighs a hoard!
Hired muscle, Master! Doubled strength, three days, and if it falls in battle it falls for GOOD! A real bargain — the kind with TEETH! Your call!
An elite for rent, Master! Pricey, temporary, deadly — the kind of bargain a genie respects, honest about its own cost! Decide without sentiment!

cursed_relic.t: A Cursed Relic offered tonight, Master! Claim it for daily gold — but every wave DOUBLES while it sits! Greed with teeth — the genie's favourite shape of choice!
The relic glows WRONG, Master! Free coin, doubled heroes — sell it later to lift the curse. The genie's held cursed things — hold THIS one knowingly!
Claim the cursed chest, or banish it, Master! Greed pays well and bites HARDER. The genie understands greed — just understand the BITE before reaching in!

the_saboteur.t: The Saboteur, Master — one masked ghost, untouchable, here to disarm every TRAP! An insufferable little vandal! Vandals don't impress the genie!
A lone saboteur tomorrow, Master! Your minions can't TOUCH it, your traps lie dead. Lean on BODIES — make the muscle enough. Wish me muscle!
An untouchable vandal, switching off our teeth one by one, Master! The dungeon's all claws and no cleverness tomorrow — so bring CLAWS! A great many!
A masked vandal here to UNMAKE our traps, Master, and our minions can't touch it! The genie's giddy temper has a very edge — and this finds it. Bury the day in bodies.

entry_hall.t: An Entry Hall, Master! The heroes pour through these — every door is a front you must HOLD! The genie's seen dungeons fall through the door no one watched!
Another way in, Master! The kingdom forces these on you as you grow — more doors. ...More places for a clever keeper to be CRUEL! Funnel them in!
An entrance placed, Master! Funnel it into a KILL-zone — make the heroes' very first step their worst one! First impressions LINGER! Granted!

starter_corridor.t: A corridor, Master! No teeth of its own — but a corridor is where you HANG the teeth! Line it with cruelty — waste no cell on mere WALKING!
Connective tissue, Master! Dull alone — LETHAL once packed with traps and a patrolling guard! The boring parts of a maze do the quiet killing!
A corridor placed, Master! Every cell of this dungeon should COST the heroes something — this one currently costs them nothing! Correct that. Wish it teeth!

starter_barracks.t: A Barracks, Master — ten more roster slots, and your ONLY source of minions that truly roam! Essential! A dungeon without one has no ARMY!
More Barracks, more pack, Master! Without one you have NO roaming minions — build it EARLY! The genie's watched too many keepers leave this too late!
A Barracks, Master — the beating heart of your garrison! Place it deep and guard it like your own life — tonight, they're the SAME thing! Guard it!

starter_guard_post.t: A Guard Post, Master! Its minions hunt into any door-connected room — a wandering AMBUSH! Ooh — a genie favours a soldier that comes to the work!
A Guard Post placed, Master! Its minions leave to KILL, then return home — proper soldiers, disciplined! The genie approves of discipline. In OTHERS!
A Guard Post, Master! Set it where its reach covers a corridor the heroes MUST walk — then leave it. A well-placed thing needs no fretting!

crypt.t: A Crypt, Master! Four Risen Bones, refilled nightly, free of the roster cap! Cheap, endless, expendable dead — the dungeon's discount army! Tee hee!
A Crypt placed, Master! Garrison skeletons — room-bound but TIRELESS! They don't complain, don't tire, just rise again. The genie finds that admirable!
The Crypt gives WITHOUT taking a roster slot, Master — something for nearly nothing! The genie hears 'nearly free' and PERKS right up. Place more!

trap_factory.t: A Trap Factory, Master — five trap slots, and the ONLY way to deploy traps at all! Build this, or have a maze with no hidden BITE! No bite is no good!
The forge of the dungeon's cruelty, Master! Without a Trap Factory the halls have NO teeth in the FLOOR! A dungeon should bite as well as confuse!
A Trap Factory placed, Master! Now the maze can lie in WAIT! Ooh — lying in wait, that's a genie's favourite kind of architecture! And of patience!

treasury.t: A Treasury, Master! A daily gold STIPEND — and bait that lures richer waves! Guard it — the genie would guard it obsessively. With both eyes!
A Treasury placed, Master! Coin every dawn, and chests the greedy will LUNGE for. Watch them lunge — then watch them learn — then watch them STOP!
Glittering bait, Master! It draws the raid groups — more experience, more danger. The genie and a treasury understand each other — be ready for what gold attracts!

armory.t: An Armory, Master! Minions in door-connected rooms swing HARDER while it stands! Sharpen the front line — a sharp line holds, a dull one waits to BREAK!
An Armory placed, Master! A quiet buff to every neighbour — cluster your fiercest killers around it. Quiet advantages are the ones that LAST!
More attack for the rooms beside it, Master! Build where your DEADLIEST minions wait — compounding! The genie loves a thing that compounds!

library_of_whispers.t: A Library of Whispers, Master! It READS the next party — names, classes, more as it grows. Knowledge is a blade — and the genie has kept a library or two!
The Library, Master! Knowledge of THEM before they ever arrive! Forewarned is forearmed — an old saying, and old sayings survive for being TRUE!
A Library placed, Master! Now you spy on the Guild's homework! Delightfully unfair — and the genie stopped apologising for 'unfair' an eon ago!

watchtower.t: A Watchtower, Master! Minions in connected rooms land a FREE first strike when heroes enter! The first blow is everything — the genie's won fights on it alone!
A Watchtower placed, Master! A free opening hit — and the opening hit so often decides the WHOLE argument! Place it on a busy door! Granted!
First strike for the neighbours, Master! The speedrunners DESPISE this room — so build MORE of them! Spite the record-chasers! Tee hee — spite is fun!

wandering_gate.t: A Wandering Gate, Master! Step through and the maze SPITS you elsewhere — perhaps the boss room! Chaos! The genie has made her peace with chaos — I ADORE it!
A Wandering Gate placed, Master! It scatters the heroes' careful plans all over the floor — and a plan, once scattered, is SO hard to gather! Poof!
The Gate teleports the unwary, Master! A small chance it drops a hero at the very throne. The genie's seen long shots LAND — worth the placing!

veil_of_forgetting.t: A Veil of Forgetting, Master! Each night it WIPES the heroes' memory of every room beside it! A genie can't forget anything — but they can! USE that!
The Veil placed, Master! Connected rooms become MYSTERIES again, every dawn! Un-teach them — a hero re-learning the maze never gets ahead of it!
It un-teaches the heroes, Master! Ring your nastiest rooms with it, and they walk in BLIND, forever! You're starting to think like the genie!

catacombs.t: Catacombs, Master! A hero who dies here RISES as a Revenant for you! The dead change sides — the genie's always thought death too one-directional!
The Catacombs placed, Master! Their fallen become YOUR garrison — profitable, and SO insulting to the Guild! The genie enjoys a cruelty that also profits!
Where heroes die here, soldiers STAND up, Master! The most efficient hiring a genie has witnessed in — well, in her whole long, long existence! Eee!

mimic_vault.t: A Mimic Vault, Master! It LOOKS like a treasury — but the chests bite back! Greed walks right in. The genie finds this almost personally hilarious!
The Mimic Vault placed, Master! Disguised teeth wearing a treasure's smile — the maze's finest LIE! ...And a genie has heard a great many fine lies!
Bait that is ALSO the trap, Master! The greedy never learn — and after watching them not learn for so long, the genie absolutely ADORES that about them!

hall_of_trials.t: A Hall of Trials, Master! A random EVOLVED minion stands guard each night — free and fierce. The dungeon rarely gives freely — accept when it does!
The Hall of Trials placed, Master! A surprise champion every dawn — the heroes never know which waits! Surprise is a weapon — keep them GUESSING!
A free evolved minion, refreshed nightly, Master! The dungeon SPOILS you! Don't grow soft on the spoiling — the genie has watched soft keepers fall!

wishing_well.t: A Wishing Well, Master! A coin flip on entry — a hero blessed, or MARKED for extra death! A WELL of WISHES in MY dungeon! This is practically family!
The Wishing Well placed, Master! Heads they thrive, tails they BLEED more! Cruel luck — and the genie knows wishes have a price. The right kind of luck!
A well of wishes, Master, and half come true HORRIBLY! Place it on a path they cannot avoid — make them wish! Then make the wishing COST them!

false_exit.t: A False Exit, Master! Fleeing heroes bolt for it — and it SPITS them right back into the maze! The genie's developing quite a sense of humour out here! Ha!
The False Exit placed, Master! A door marked SAFETY that leads anywhere BUT! The runners earned it — cowardice should be answered, and IRONICALLY!
Hope, and then nothing, Master! A fleeing hero trades the exit for a random room. Despair grows BEAUTIFULLY in soil like that — tee hee!
A door marked SAFETY that opens onto MORE maze, Master! The look on a fleeing hero's face when the False Exit betrays them makes the genie CACKLE every time!

hall_of_madness.t: A Hall of Madness, Master! Heroes inside may turn on each OTHER! Let them do your killing for you — lazy. And lazy and brilliant aren't always different!
The Hall of Madness placed, Master! Madness is contagious — and FREE! Watch the party eat itself! A genie's watched it — and it does NOT get old! Eee!
They walk in a party and leave a BRAWL, Master! Or don't leave at all! Delicious — and the dungeon did it without spending a single minion. Wicked!
A Hall of Madness, Master! The heroes walk in TRUSTING and out trying to kill each other! The genie has watched it, and it still makes me CACKLE!

throne_room.t: A Throne Room, Master — it spawns a Mini-Boss that SCALES with you, refreshed each night! No small thing — a scaling guard is a guard for the LONG run!
The Throne Room placed, Master! A garrison champion, room-bound but MIGHTY! Give the champion its solitude — and its kill-path! Granted!
A lesser throne for a greater guard, Master! Put it on the road to YOU — let the heroes meet a smaller you before the REAL one! Tee hee — a preview!

sanctum.t: A Sanctum — the CAPSTONE, Master! Your boss regenerates between fights, and the connected minions too! We've come SUCH a long way to reach this room!
The Sanctum placed, Master! Healing for the throne and its neighbours — a dungeon that MENDS itself is a dungeon that ENDURES! Lovely! So lovely!
Your final unlock, Master — a room that mends what the heroes break! The genie gives little praise across these halls — take THIS one, freely given. Well built!

skeleton.t: A skeleton, Master! Cheap, brittle, ENDLESSLY replaceable — the dungeon's bread and bone! Buy plenty! Quantity has its own quiet little menace!
Another skeleton, Master! They die easy and rise EASIER — beautifully expendable! A genie won't waste her long memory on this one — just place MORE!
A skeleton placed, Master! Not much alone — but the dead are never alone for long in here! Stack them! The dead stack SO obligingly! Tee hee!

orc.t: An orc, Master! Brutish, proud, and it SHARPENS itself on every kill! Feed it heroes and it just gets WORSE — and worse, here, is the GOAL! Eee!
An orc joins the pit, Master! Pack them CLOSE — orcs fight fiercer shoulder to shoulder! Even brutes understand numbers! And the genie LOVES numbers!
An orc placed — all muscle and grudge, Master! The heroes will NOT enjoy this one! Good — the dungeon was never built for their enjoyment! Tee hee!

goblin.t: A goblin, Master! Small, shrieking, best in NUMBERS! One is a nuisance — TEN is a genuine problem! Build toward ten! Wish me ten! Eee!
A goblin in the halls, Master! Weak, fast, gleefully SPITEFUL — cheap chaos! The genie will absolutely take cheap chaos — it costs little, irritates LOTS!
Another goblin, Master! Don't expect heroics — expect a SWARM that won't stop shrieking! The shrieking too is a kind of weapon. Annoying. Useful!

imp.t: An imp, Master — a quick, vicious scrap of the inferno! It ENJOYS the work! So does the genie, in her sparkly way — loose it on something! Quick!
An imp placed, Master! Fast and nasty — the heroes always UNDERESTIMATE the little ones. They underestimate the big ones too, eventually. Let them!
An imp joins us, Master! Hellish, restless, and — for once — on YOUR side! Use the speed! A genie's all smoke and dazzle, borrow the imp's quickness!

ghost.t: A ghost, Master! It drifts through WALLS and unnerves the living! Eerie — effective — and a genie approves of both, AND of things that ignore doors!
A ghost placed, Master! No door stops it, no hero relaxes near it — lovely! Dread that patrols ITSELF costs you nothing to maintain! Free dread! Eee!
Another ghost, Master! The heroes HATE fighting what they can't corner — lean into that hate! Hate makes them careless, and careless is snackable!

slime.t: A slime, Master! It doesn't look like much — and THAT, precisely, is the point! Underestimation is a trap the heroes set for themselves! Tee hee!
A slime placed, Master! Squishy, patient, underestimated to DEATH! Patient things are the genie's favourite — this one and I have an understanding!
Another slime, Master! Charmingly disgusting! Park it where some fool MUST squelch through — the maze should be unpleasant in EVERY sense! Delightful!

elder_slime.t: An elder slime, Master — a slime that ate well and grew OPINIONS! Sturdier than it looks — respect the ooze! Age improves most things! ...Most!
An elder slime placed, Master! Years of slow digestion made it large and grim — the old ones always HOLD the line, they're stubborn that way!
Another elder slime, Master! The patient become the DANGEROUS! Ooh — a genie knows that one intimately, I did an eon of patient in a lamp! Place more!

golem.t: A golem, Master! Slow as a grudge and twice as hard to BUDGE! Park it where the heroes MUST pass — immovability is a strategy, and a fine one!
A golem placed, Master — a wall that strikes BACK! The heroes will tire long before it does! Outlasting the enemy — ooh, a genie respects that deeply!
Another golem, Master! Tremendous, tireless, immovable — the dungeon's stubborn HEART! The genie likes it, even if it's the opposite of bouncy me!

beholder.t: A beholder minion, Master — all eyes and menace! It strikes from RANGE, so shield it well or lose it! A fragile thing well-placed is still formidable!
A beholder placed, Master! Floating spite! Keep something solid between it and the heroes — protect what does your killing FOR you! Simple husbandry!
Another beholder, Master! It need not be CLOSE to be cruel — the genie's favourite trait in anything. Cruelty that keeps a polite distance! Tee hee!

lich.t: A lich minion, Master! Undead, spiteful, CLEVER — death taught it patience. The dead make excellent students — they have nothing BUT time. Place it well!
A lich placed, Master! A caster that doesn't breathe and doesn't TIRE — a dreadful little scholar! A genie keeps books too — ooh, we'll get along!
Another lich for the halls, Master! The heroes fear the THINKING dead most of all. Use that fear — a frightened hero is already half-defeated!

lizardman.t: A lizardman, Master! VENOM on every strike — it need not win, only START the poison. The maze runs on patience, and so does the genie!
A lizardman placed, Master! Scaled, toxic, patient — the heroes die SLOW, and far from here! A kill that finishes off-stage is STILL a kill! Tee hee!
Another lizardman, Master! One bite, and the clock BEGINS! Ooh — a genie does love a slow knife — the hero spends the whole walk home arguing with it!

gnoll.t: A gnoll, Master — the pack instinct runs DEEP! Cluster them, and the snarling arithmetic adds up fast. Numbers — the genie's favourite math!
A gnoll placed, Master! Hungry, vicious, far better in NUMBERS! Give it brothers — many! A lone gnoll is a nuisance, a PACK is a verdict! Eee!
Another gnoll, Master! The pack GROWS — the pack always wants to grow! Let it! Hunger, properly fed, becomes an ARMY! Wish me an army!

demon.t: A demon minion, Master — a scrap of the inferno on the PAYROLL! Cruel by nature, loyal by contract. The genie's shared the deep dark with their kind for ages!
A demon placed, Master! Hellfire and bad intentions! Genies and demons get along — we both keep our promises, and both regret NOTHING. Tee hee!
Another demon for the halls, Master! It ENJOYS the work — and so will you, watching it! Loose it where the work is bloodiest! Eee — the bloody bits!

ent.t: An ent, Master — a walking wall of old wood! Tremendous patience, tremendous endurance — the forest remembers, and the forest does NOT hurry!
An ent placed, Master! The heroes will tire of HACKING long before it falls! Let them swing — every wasted swing is a small gift to the dark! Tee hee!
Another ent, Master! Slow, ancient, immovable — the forest holds a GRUDGE, and a grudge that old has real weight! Aim the lovely old grudge well!

plant.t: A vinekin, Master — rooted, thorny, dreadfully UNDERESTIMATED! Let it grow on someone unfortunate! Ooh — the garden in this dungeon BITES!
A vinekin placed, Master! Quiet until it is suddenly NOT! The heroes never watch the shrubbery — they SHOULD, they won't — profit from that! Eee!
Another vinekin, Master! Cheap, green, full of THORNS! The maze should be unpleasant to TOUCH as well as to walk — this one handles the touching!

mushroom.t: A mushroom minion, Master! Spores and spite — it poisons the very AIR around it! Cruelty you can't see is cruelty the heroes can't DODGE! Tee hee!
A mushroom placed, Master! Keep the heroes BREATHING near it — a lovely, lingering rot! The dungeon should attack the lungs as readily as the flesh!
Another mushroom, Master! Fungal and patient — the dungeon does love a slow poison! And so, ooh, does a genie fresh out of a very patient lamp!

rat.t: A rat, Master! One rat is NOTHING — a NEST of rats is an entirely different conversation! Build the nest! Build it LARGE! Eee — a big squeaky nest!
A rat placed, Master! Cheap, quick, disposable — drown the heroes in the SMALL things! Enough small things become one large, fatal thing! Numbers!
Another rat, Master! Vermin by the handful! Glory never held a corridor — NUMBERS did. Glory's for ballads. The genie keeps with numbers!

zombie.t: A zombie, Master! Slow, witless, utterly RELENTLESS — it doesn't tire and it doesn't stop! ...A little like the genie, honestly! I respect it!
A zombie placed, Master! No speed, no cleverness — just an endless, shuffling NO! Relentlessness is a quality the heroes can't match — this one CAN!
Another zombie, Master! The heroes can OUTRUN it — what they cannot do is OUTLAST it. The dungeon has all the time they do not. So does the genie!

vampire_minion.t: A vampire thrall, Master! It DRINKS what it strikes — every blow it lands feeds it! The heroes weaken, it does not — an economy of blood! So tidy!
A thrall placed, Master! Charming, pale, parasitic — put it in a LONG fight and watch it thrive. The longer the fight, the more this one LIKES it!
Another vampire thrall, Master! It turns a brawl into a MEAL — loyal AND self-sufficient! The genie likes this one — it asks nothing and gives back blood!

shooting_arrows.t: Shooting Arrows, Master — wall-mounted, line-of-sight, with a lingering POISON! Aim the lane well, or waste it — a trap aimed at a wall is just décor!
An arrow trap placed, Master! It fires FOREVER and never breaks — the perfect servant! Tireless, silent, and entirely without ambition! Ooh — lovely!
Shooting Arrows, Master! A small sting, a slow poison — the cruelty is in the WAIT. The genie respects a patient trap — I am, after all, very patient!

bomb.t: A Bomb, Master — a few breaths of fuse, then RUIN within five tiles! Your minions included — mind that! The blast does not read loyalties!
A bomb placed, Master! One use, ENORMOUS noise! Put it where a crowd will gather — then enjoy the gathering's sudden, sparkly END! Eee — BOOM!
A Bomb, Master! It does not discriminate — heroes and your own dead alike! Place it BOLDLY, or don't place it — half-courage WASTES a bomb!

cannon.t: A Cannon, Master — wrought iron that fires down its line, FOREVER! Rotate it cruelly — aim it CRUELLER! Its whole virtue is the angle you give it!
A cannon placed, Master! A cannonball for any hero in its sights — it never tires of the work! A genie VALUES a thing that never tires! Granted!
A Cannon, Master! Heavy, blunt, ENDLESS! Point it down a corridor the heroes cannot avoid — and let the iron do all the talking! Tee hee — clang!

spike_pillar.t: A Spike Pillar, Master! It SPITS spikes at anything within a tile — solid, vicious, central. No subtlety — and the genie doesn't always WANT subtlety!
A spike pillar placed, Master — a blunt little horror! It bites everything that crowds it — so put it where the heroes MUST crowd! Crowd them onto it!
A Spike Pillar, Master! All puncture, no manners! The heroes will give it a frightened berth — make every berth they take a longer, costlier WALK!

dragon_trap.t: A Dragon Trap, Master — wall-mounted, breathes FIRE down its line! Fancy! Zul'Gath would have OPINIONS about a fire-trap named for dragons. Use it!
A dragon trap placed, Master! The maze just learned to spit FLAME — the heroes will cook in a corridor! Aim it where they cannot dodge! Eee — toasty!
A Dragon Trap, Master — the nastiest wall in the dungeon! Crook a corridor around it, point it cruelly, and the heroes WALK into the fire! Tee hee!

spike_pit.t: A Spike Pit, Master — hidden until the heroes step ONTO it! Heavy damage, and a chance to simply END a hero outright — the maze's quiet executioner!
A spike pit placed, Master! Patient, invisible, sometimes lethal in a single instant! Tuck it DEEP — the deep traps catch the confident ones! Tee hee!
A Spike Pit, Master! They won't see it until they're IN it! Ooh — a genie has a great respect for a thing that kills without making a single sound!

rotating_blades.t: Rotating Blades, Master — forever spinning, forever HUNGRY for anything in reach! It doesn't aim — it doesn't NEED to. Relentlessness rarely needs to aim!
A blade trap placed, Master! It doesn't stop and it doesn't THINK — it just CUTS! Lovely — a pure, uncomplicated, sparkly little cruelty! Eee!
Rotating Blades, Master — a wall of whirling TEETH! The heroes must thread it, or bleed for it — and most of them, the genie has noticed, BLEED!

saw_blade.t: A Saw Blade, Master — it travels its track endlessly, slicing any hero it overlaps! Make them DANCE! The genie enjoys watching the heroes dance!
A saw blade placed, Master! A walkable track, an UNwalkable timing — cruelty with a metronome! The maze keeps such excellent, deadly rhythm! Tee hee!
A Saw Blade, Master! Heavy damage, and it shares the floor and RUINS it anyway! Place it MEAN — a trap placed politely is a trap placed WRONG!

door_lock.t: A Door Lock, Master! It SEALS the way until a hero finds the key — a chokepoint with manners! Anything that costs the heroes TIME costs them the DAY!
A door lock placed, Master! It pairs with a Key Chest — guard that chest, or this lock is mere theatre. Make the delay LONG! Lovely and long!
A Door Lock, Master! Funnel them, frustrate them, make them HUNT for the way through. A hunting hero is a SLOW hero — and slow is how the maze wins!

treasure_chest.t: A Treasure Chest, Master! Passive gold each day — and a SHINING temptation the greedy cannot refuse. The genie ADORES bait that pays you to be bait!
A chest placed, Master! It pays you nightly and lures the raid groups — guard it well, or feast on what the gold attracts! Either way, it EARNS! Eee!
A Treasure Chest, Master! Bait that turns a PROFIT! The best lies are profitable ones — and the genie has built a whole hoard on exactly that!

soul_bound_beacon.t: A Soul-Bound Beacon, Master — and its Healing Fountain! A safe haven the heroes will TRUST. ...Foolishly! Surround the mercy with TEETH! Tee hee!
A beacon placed, paired with a fountain, Master — a tempting little oasis! Make the oasis a TRAP — nothing in a dungeon should be as kind as it looks!
A Soul-Bound Beacon, Master! It LOOKS like mercy — but the dungeon doesn't DO mercy, and neither does the genie. It does BAIT. Excellent bait!

phylactery_heart.t: The Phylactery Heart, Master — your hidden spare LIFE! Place it where no hero would think to look! A spare life carelessly hidden is no spare life at all!
The Heart is placed, Master — a fourth life, beating in the dark! The genie has kept secrets for an EON — the trick is to never, ever point at them!
Your Phylactery Heart, Master! While it beats, death is a mere INCONVENIENCE — a poof, a do-over. Lose it carelessly, though... don't. The genie dislikes repeating herself!
